---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Dextranic
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this feature solve? What is the use case?

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've considered.

## Additional Context

Mockups, examples, or related issues.

---

> **Note:** For large features, please open a [GitHub Discussion](../../discussions) first to get feedback before opening a feature request issue.
